name: pdf-lib
when_to_use: 当交付物是「在客户给的现有 PDF 上操作」——填 AcroForm 表单域、合并/拆分页面、盖章/水印、旋转裁剪、扁平化(flatten)表单——而非从空白排版时用它;纯从零排版走 jspdf/pdfmake/react-pdf,只渲染/读现有 PDF 走 pdfjs-dist,固定版式套数据走 pdfme。
why_valuable: 原生 AI 能从零画 PDF,但改一份已有 PDF 做不到:填表单域、合并页面、盖水印都要操作 PDF 对象图(xref/streams/AcroForm),手写字节必崩;pdf-lib 是唯一「加载现有 PDF → 编辑 → 存回」的纯浏览器零 Node 依赖库。

en.when_to_use: Use it when the deliverable requires operating on an existing client-supplied PDF: filling AcroForm fields, merging or splitting pages, adding stamps or watermarks, rotating or cropping, or flattening forms, rather than laying out a blank document. For from-scratch layout use jspdf/pdfmake/react-pdf; to render or read an existing PDF use pdfjs-dist; to fill a fixed layout with data use pdfme.
en.why_valuable: Native AI can draw a PDF from scratch but cannot modify an existing one. Filling fields, merging pages, and adding watermarks require manipulating the PDF object graph (xref/streams/AcroForm), and hand-written bytes inevitably fail. pdf-lib is the only pure-browser, zero-Node-dependency library for loading an existing PDF, editing it, and saving it back.

data_in.note: There are two input paths: to modify an existing PDF, pass existingPdf as base64/ArrayBuffer/Uint8Array plus field values; to create from scratch, omit existingPdf. Saving is always await doc.save(), which returns Uint8Array for consuming AI to wrap in a Blob for download or preview.

schema.existingPdf?: string (plain base64 without a data-uri prefix) | ArrayBuffer | Uint8Array - existing PDF bytes; when provided, use the PDFDocument.load editing path, otherwise create with PDFDocument.create
schema.formFields?: Record<string,string> - AcroForm text-field name to value; keys must be real field names in the PDF or an error is thrown
schema.flatten?: boolean - default false; when true, call form.flatten() after filling so fields become fixed and no longer editable

draws?.text: string - text to draw as a watermark or stamp
draws?.x: number - origin is at the page's bottom-left and y increases upward, opposite to screen coordinates

data_in.note: 两种输入路线:改现有 PDF 传 existingPdf(base64/ArrayBuffer/Uint8Array)+ 要填的字段值;从零建则省 existingPdf。存回一律 await doc.save() → Uint8Array,消费 AI 包成 Blob 交下载/预览。

schema.existingPdf?: string(纯 base64,无 data-uri 前缀) | ArrayBuffer | Uint8Array —— 现有 PDF 字节;给了走 PDFDocument.load 编辑路线,否则 PDFDocument.create 新建
schema.formFields?: Record<string,string> —— AcroForm 文本域 名→值;键必须是 PDF 里真实存在的域名(不存在会抛错)
schema.flatten?: boolean —— 默认 false;true 则填完 form.flatten() 使字段固化不可再编辑

draws?.text: string —— 要绘制的文字(水印/盖章)
draws?.x: number —— 坐标原点在页面左下、y 向上(与屏幕相反)

provides._note: headless-primitive:不渲染、无 L 级、无 carriers 矩阵;产出 Uint8Array PDF 字节,消费 AI 决定下载或交 pdfjs-dist 渲染预览。
provides.outputs: await doc.save() → Uint8Array;new Blob([bytes],{type:'application/pdf'}) 下载或预览。

api_surface.load_or_create: PDFDocument.load(bytes) 编辑现有 / PDFDocument.create() 从零

boot.note: 坐标系原点在页面左下、y 向上(与屏幕相反)。getTextField 对不存在的域名会抛错,消费 AI 应先容错或用 form.getFields() 列举真实域名。本库只产字节,widget 里若要预览需另接 pdfjs-dist;pdf-lib 自身零 shadow/head 足迹。

isolation.evidence: Verified vs jsDelivr pdf-lib@1.17.1 +esm (234KB): named exports used by boot all present (oe as PDFDocument, Q as rgb, Tr as StandardFonts); no default export (boot uses named imports correctly). Signatures from es/api/PDFDocument.d.ts: static load(pdf:string|Uint8Array|ArrayBuffer,options?)→Promise<PDFDocument>; static create(options?)→Promise<PDFDocument>; getForm()→PDFForm; addPage(page?:PDFPage|[number,number])→PDFPage; embedFont(...)→Promise; save(options?)→Promise<Uint8Array>. es/api/form/PDFForm.d.ts: getTextField(name)→PDFTextField; getField(name)→PDFField; flatten(options?)→void — all match api_surface/boot. Global-footprint grep over full +esm: document.head 0, document.body 0, document.createElement 0, <style/insertRule/adoptedStyleSheets 0, addEventListener 0 — pure-JS byte producer, renders nothing into the DOM, so trivially shadow-safe (no carriers matrix by design).
